'''Pakrik Major''' was the sector capital of [[Kanchen sector/Legends|Kanchen sector]]. It was a [[Planet/Legends|Planet]] in the [[Pakrik system/Legends|Pakrik system]] and was located in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] region. It was more densely populated than its twin world, [[Pakrik Minor]], and hosted the annual [[Kanchen Sector Conference]]. It was ruled by the [[Grandiose Elector]].

{{Planet-stub}}
